SEVERE WIND DAMAGE IN CHILDRESS REPORTED FROM ABOUT 839 PM TO 855 PM. MANY LARGE TREE LIMBS DOWN. GAS STATION CANOPY BLOWN OFF ON 5TH AND MAIN. GROCERY STORE SIGN BLOWN DOWN. SEMI TRUCK BLOWN OVER ON WESTERN OUTSKIRTS OF TOWN. MANY POWER LINES DOWN...POWER AND SOME COMMUNICATIONS FAILED. UNKNOWN IF DAMAGE WAS FROM STRAIGHT LINE WINDS...TORNADO...OR COMBINATION OF BOTH PENDING A STORM SURVEY.
